body:
## Pull request overview Follow-up SonarQube-driven cleanup focused on clearer exception semantics and reduced duplication across the blockchain integration paths (audit-writer + query-service), plus test refactors to remove `Thread.sleep()` and a few minor frontend tweaks. **Changes:** - Refactors audit-writer blockchain writing flow (credential resolution, retry loop extraction, narrowed exception handling) and updates the Web3j contract wrapper to use `sendAsync().join()` with domain exception wrapping. - Tightens blockchain read error handling in query-service (IOException-specific wrapping, narrower catches, improved debug logging) and small mapper/service cleanup. - Kafka-related config/test adjustments (custom JSON serializers, config key constants, narrowed SQL exception handling) and test helper refactors for async waits. ### Reviewed changes Copilot reviewed 18 out of 18 changed files in this pull request and generated 2 comments.
Show a summary per file | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | frontend/audit-ui/src/app/features/audit-dashboard/audit-dashboard.component.ts | Marks `@ViewChild` drawer reference as `readonly`. | | frontend/audit-ui/src/app/features/audit-dashboard/audit-dashboard.component.scss | Adjusts on-chain status chip text color. | | frontend/audit-ui/src/app/features/audit-dashboard/audit-dashboard.component.html | Tweaks integrity chip markup (including tooltip focus behavior). | | backend/query-service/src/test/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/query/integration/IntegrityCheckIntegrationTest.java | Makes JSONPath assertions more explicit/robust via lambda + MatcherAssert. | | backend/query-service/src/main/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/query/service/AuditIntegrityCheckService.java | Minor parameter renames for clarity in integrity check mapping flow. | | backend/query-service/src/main/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/query/mapper/AuditEventDtoMapper.java | Renames ignored exception variable to avoid underscore identifier. | | backend/query-service/src/main/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/query/blockchain/AuditLedgerBlockchainClient.java | Narrows exception types (IOException/RuntimeException), improves RPC URI parsing logging, refines blockchain read error classification. | | backend/event-store-service/src/test/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/eventstore/EventStoreKafkaToPostgresIntegrationTest.java | Narrows DB read catch to `SQLException`. | | backend/event-store-service/src/main/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/eventstore/consumer/AuditEventConsumer.java | Renames local variables for readability and error message construction. | | backend/event-store-service/src/main/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/eventstore/config/KafkaListenerConfig.java | Replaces direct JsonDeserializer constants with string config keys/constants; renames lambda params. | | backend/command-service/src/test/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/command/service/UserLoginCommandServiceKafkaIntegrationTest.java | Uses explicit consumer props setup and introduces a canonical JSON serializer for `AuditEvent`. | | backend/audit-writer-service/src/test/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/auditwriter/service/BlockchainWriterServiceTest.java | Refactors tests to remove `Thread.sleep()`, adds reusable async helpers, updates constructors to nullable `Credentials`. | | backend/audit-writer-service/src/test/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/auditwriter/consumer/AuditEventConsumerKafkaTestcontainersTest.java | Replaces sleeps with park-based helper and renames loop variables. | | backend/audit-writer-service/src/main/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/auditwriter/service/HashCalculationService.java | Narrows JSON serialization failure catch to `JsonProcessingException`. | | backend/audit-writer-service/src/main/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/auditwriter/service/BlockchainWriterService.java | Refactors retry logic, replaces Optional credentials with nullable `Credentials`, adds configuration validation helpers, narrows exception handling. | | backend/audit-writer-service/src/main/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/auditwriter/config/Web3jValidationUtils.java | Renames ignored exception variable for URI validation. | | backend/audit-writer-service/src/main/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/auditwriter/config/KafkaListenerConfig.java | Replaces Spring Kafka JsonSerializer usage with a custom serializer and config key constants; renames lambda params. | | backend/audit-writer-service/src/main/java/lt/satsyuk/distributed/audit/auditwriter/blockchain/AuditLedgerContract.java | Switches contract calls to async+join with centralized exception wrapping (`ContractOperationException`). |
--- ЁЯТб Add Copilot custom instructions for smarter, more guided reviews. Learn how to get started.
